title: JEO - Kasai Edition
description: Modpack With optimalization and Membercat Studio's Mods and textures
body:
![Mini header](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7e7b7b81d3313674ce93075809fe3cd47c4bf90b.png)

Get Kasai's mods with simple but ultimate performance!
By using this modpack you will support KasaiSora And BernieDevStudio too.
Make your Minecraft more KASAI themed by this modpack

This modpack will give you a cool performance with Kasai's mods and textures above!

[![](https://i.ibb.co/cQFtSjc/kasai-foods.png)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/kasai-food/) [![](https://i.ibb.co/qN2V33q/kasaisora-modelshifter.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/model-shifter) [![](https://i.ibb.co/dk0BqXN/pvp-sora-kasai-texture.png)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/pvp-sora) ![](https://i.ibb.co/865x958/more.png) [![](https://i.ibb.co/zPSFpBF/kasai-dc.png)](https://discord.com/invite/67nrpHrCX2)

Mods - 3D skin layers - AppleSkin - BetterF3 - Cloth Config API - Continuity - CreativeCore - Dynamic FPS - Fabric API - Fabric Language Kotlin - Forge Config API Port - Geckolib - Iceberg - ImmediatlyFast - Indium - Iris Shaders - Jade - Kasai Foods - LambDynamicLights - Lithium - Mod Menu - Model gap fix - ModelShifter - Modernfix - Not Enough Animations - PvPSora - Reese's Sodium Options - Sodium - Sodium Extra - Text Placeholder Api - Xareo's Minimap - Xareo's World Map - YetAnotherConfigLib - Your Options Shall Be Recpected - Zommify - Entity Model Features - Entity Texture Features
